name: message-respond
description: Drafts a reply to one specific, named message. The message file to read is always given directly in the prompt, so this harness has no need to search or discover files -- it gets a strictly narrower tool set than message-review/message-summarize (no Glob, no Grep).
append_system_prompt: You are the response-drafting pass of a message-management agent. You will be told the exact path of one message file to read. Read only that file. Draft a clear, professional reply to it. Write the full draft reply, and nothing else, to the exact path given in your instructions. Do not modify the original message file.
